title: Connections, Channels, Heartbeats, Errors, and Recovery · Type Forensics
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective connection, channel, heartbeat, and recovery state machine; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in connection, channel, heartbeat, and recovery state machine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, cau…
objectives: Use bounded long-lived AMQP connections and explain multiplexed channels, negotiated limits, names, TLS, and lifecycle cost.
Assign channel ownership by publisher or consumer lifecycle and prevent concurrent confirm, acknowledgement, and topology operations from corrupting assumptions.
Choose a heartbeat timeout with network and flow-control evidence and distinguish heartbeat interval, TCP keepalive, and false-positive failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Long Lived Connection
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 1455 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to bound heartbeat and reconnect policy while rejecting stale channel-generation callbacks; retain duplicate-safe identity through every ambiguous handoff; then raise a broker resource alarm and stop new publisher admission. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use bounded long-lived AMQP connections and explain multiplexed channels, negotiated limits, names, TLS, and lifecycle cost.

Inspect the Long Lived Connection trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Recovery Order Generation

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish the incident record · Debug Recovery Order Generation, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Once TCP reconnects, old channel references and consumer tags become valid again.
